overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a leather jacket exploring a modern urban waterfront dock. The character walks along a wooden pier past a white yacht, examines the water near a contemporary building with 'Tidis' signage, and returns as the camera rotates to reveal their face.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock away from the starting point, passing a white yacht on the left side

entered.detail: modern white and black motor yacht moored alongside the dock
wooden planked walkway with metal edging extending over the water
large green tarp-covered containers or equipment on the dockside
tall concrete wall forming the canal embankment with buildings above
murky green water of the urban canal with gentle ripples

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow wooden dock extending over a canal, with a sleek white motor yacht moored on the left and green tarp-covered containers on the right. The dock leads toward a concrete embankment wall under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock approaching modern commercial building

events.description: character turns around at the end of the dock and begins walking back toward the building

agents.ego_description: turning around at the pier's end and walking back along the dock, passing the yacht now on the right side

entered.detail: large contemporary building with angular white facade and prominent 'Tidis' signage

segments.scene_description: After reaching the dock's end, the character turns and walks back, revealing the modern Tidis building on the left. The white yacht is now on the right as the character approaches the building's waterfront entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: submerged dock ramp with building foundation vegetation

events.description: character stops walking and stands at the water's edge to observe the surroundings

agents.ego_description: standing at the end of the dock near the building, looking down at the water and vegetation along the waterline

entered.detail: tall green reeds and aquatic plants growing along the water's edge at the building base
wooden ramp descending into the murky water at the dock's terminus
metal safety railing along the edge of the dock approach

segments.scene_description: The character stands at the dock's end where it becomes a submerged ramp, examining the water and dense vegetation growing along the building's foundation. The Tidis building looms close on the left while reeds sway in the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock with pedestrian bridge overlook

events.description: character turns away from the water and begins walking back toward the camera
camera rotates around the character to reveal a close-up of their face and upper body

agents.ego_description: turning away from the water and walking back along the dock toward the camera, eventually facing the camera directly to reveal facial tattoos and leather jacket details

entered.detail: elevated metal walkway with railings connecting building sections overhead

segments.scene_description: The character turns and walks back from the water's edge, passing under a metal pedestrian bridge. As they approach, the camera rotates to a frontal view, revealing the character's face with distinctive tattoos and the detailed leather jacket against the backdrop of the modern waterfront architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a modern urban waterfront that shifts from a narrow industrial dock to a close-up reveal of the character. It begins with the character walking down a wooden pier between a sleek white yacht and green tarp-covered containers toward a concrete embankment under an overcast sky. As the character turns and walks back, the perspective shifts to reveal the contemporary Tidis building on the left before the camera follows them to a submerged ramp where reeds sway against the building's foundation. The scene then moves away from the water's edge and passes under a metal pedestrian bridge, as the camera rotates to a frontal view. Finally, the movement culminates in a detailed shot of the character's tattooed face and leather jacket set against the backdrop of the waterfront architecture.
